title: Add public re-exports at crate root for core types
description: lib.rs exposes all modules as bare pub mod declarations. Users must write jmap_chat::client::JmapChatClient, jmap_chat::error::ClientError, jmap_chat::auth::BearerAuth etc. Standard library crate practice is to re-export the types callers need most often at the crate root so they can write use jmap_chat::JmapChatClient. Add pub use at the crate root for: JmapChatClient, SessionClient, ClientError, AuthProvider, NoneAuth, BearerAuth, BasicAuth, CustomCaAuth, Session, Id, UTCDate. Optionally add a prelude module.
notes: Epic: jmap-chat-tui-4pp (jmap-chat API idiomaticity: review findings)
